verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When I think of Jesus This man who died for me Took my sins away What made Him give his life, It was the meaning of Amazing Grace, I just couldn't see, The bloody Lamb Who died and was slain for me, I could not believe, The suffering He bore, Took my place on that tree,

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Despised and rejected, It pleased the Father To give His Son for my life, Smitten and afflicted, I am now a prisoner of Christ, I've never known such love, To save me from the wrath He covered me with His blood, Amazing Grace I see, Justified, He died, I stand

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Free! From the bondages of sin, Christ now dwells within, I'm free! He was the perfect sacrifice, The Lamb gave me His life,

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Despised and rejected, It pleased the Father To slay His Son for my life, Smitten and afflicted, I'm now a prisoner of Christ, I've never known such love, To save me from the wrath He covered me with His blood, Amazing Grace I see, Justified, He died, I stand

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Tengo libertad, En esclavitud del pecado, Cristo vive en mi, Tengo libertad, El sacrificio perfecto, El cordero me dio su vida,

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: The Cross, The Cross, The Cross, The Cross The Cross, The Cross Now I'm living my life in the bloody Footprints of the cross Oh yeah

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: La Cruz, La Cruz, La Cruz, La Cruz, La Cruz, La Cruz, Estoy viviendo en las huellas Ensangrentada de la Cruz

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: Lord please keep me in the bloody Footprints of the Cross
